title: T-034 — output_yield_gate_v1 evaluator + soft flag on registration complete
prompt:
# T-034 — output_yield_gate_v1 evaluator (soft gate)

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §10.4, §6 D4

## Goal
Implement evaluator for output_yield_gate_v1 (soft gate) that fires after register-output marks the WO outputs as complete; if abs(1 - actual_yield/bom.yield_pct) > 0.10 default, raise an alert event flagging Prod Manager review.

## Implementation contract
packages/api-services/production/evaluate-output-yield-gate.ts: input wo_id, output sum(wo_outputs.qty_kg) / sum(wo_material_consumption.qty_consumed), variance_ratio = actual / bom.yield_pct. If abs(1-ratio) > 0.10 (configurable from prod_settings.output_yield_gate.variance_threshold), INSERT alerts row {severity:'medium', kind:'yield_anomaly', wo_id, actual_yield_pct, expected_yield_pct, variance_pct} and emit log warn. The evaluator runs inside register-output once final output flag set on the WO (introduce a 'completion candidate' helper). Returns {passed: boolean, variance_pct, alert_id?}.

## Files (scope)
- packages/api-services/production/evaluate-output-yield-gate.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/register-output.ts [modify]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/output-yield-gate.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given actual_yield=0.99 and bom.yield_pct=0.95 (variance ~4%), when evaluator runs, then passed=true and no alert row inserted
2. Given actual_yield=0.70 and bom.yield_pct=0.95 (variance ~26%), when evaluator runs, then passed=false, variance_pct≈0.263, and alert row inserted severity=medium kind='yield_anomaly'
3. Given prod_settings.variance_threshold overridden to 0.05, when actual variance=0.07, then passed=false (override respected)

## Test strategy
- RED: unit test asserting pass + flag + threshold-override before evaluator exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter api-services test output-yield-gate'

## Risk red lines
- Do not block output registration (D4: soft gate)
- Do not skip threshold override from prod_settings (per-tenant config)
- Do not raise alert without Prod Manager routing flag

pipeline_inputs.description: Soft output yield gate evaluator: variance >10% raises Prod Manager alert.
pipeline_inputs.details: Pure evaluator + alert insert. No state machine block. Integrates with register-output completion candidate flag. Threshold from prod_settings.output_yield_gate.variance_threshold default 0.10.
out_of_scope: Do not implement Prod Manager review screen (UI task)
acceptance_criteria: Given variance ~4%, when evaluator runs, then passed=true and no alert row
Given variance ~26%, when evaluator runs, then passed=false and alert row inserted severity=medium kind='yield_anomaly'
Given threshold override 0.05 and variance 0.07, when evaluator runs, then passed=false
test_strategy: RED: unit test asserting pass + flag + threshold override before evaluator exists
risk_red_lines: Do not skip Prod Manager routing
